description: TCEL Tenant-9 Banking/Treasury package (T9-002), onboarded as ECARMF knowledge-package metadata. Depends on the TCEL Foundation (T9-001) for LegalEntity/Manager master data. Entities from the merged T9-002 schemas (FinancialAccount, FinancialTransaction, CashDirectionRecommendation); the BR-001..022 control catalog becomes executable rules where the declarative condition model allows (status/boolean/threshold controls) plus a traceability knowledge asset for the full catalog; BankRisk.AI is a governed advisory agent (no autonomous execution). The bank-risk register uses the dynamic riskType {category} token so ONE assessment record type tags every risk category. Boundary vs T9-003 (Trading) and T9-004 (Enterprise Risk): this package owns ONLY banking accounts, treasury/cash-direction, borrowing/covenants, and bank/reconciliation controls.
name: TCEL Banking, Treasury & BankRisk.AI

entities.description: A normalized financial transaction from any bank/broker/custodian source (T9-002 financial-transaction.schema.json).
A BankRisk.AI cash-direction recommendation - advisory, human-approved (T9-002 cash-direction-recommendation.schema.json).
One banking/treasury risk-register entry. category drives the riskType tag via the dynamic {category} token, so one record type serves every bank-risk category.

rules.name: Inactive or restricted account activity
rules.description: Preventive/Critical (Owner: Banking Risk). Reject activity on a restricted account.
rules.reasonTemplate: BR-002: activity on restricted account {accountId} rejected (Banking Risk).

rules.name: Stale critical feed
rules.description: Preventive/Critical (Owner: Technology/Treasury). Set DataRestricted; block automated approval.
rules.reasonTemplate: BR-003: critical feed {sourceSystem} is stale - DataRestricted, automated approval blocked (Technology/Treasury).

rules.name: Unverified beneficiary
rules.description: Preventive/Critical (Owner: Treasury). Reject transfer to an unverified beneficiary.
rules.reasonTemplate: BR-004: transfer to unverified beneficiary on {sourceAccountId} rejected (Treasury).

rules.name: External transfer dual approval
rules.description: Preventive/Critical (Owner: Treasury). Hold external transfers until a second approver signs off.
rules.reasonTemplate: BR-005: external transfer of {amount} {currency} held pending a second approver (Treasury).

rules.name: Critical unresolved reconciliation break
rules.description: Preventive/Critical (Owner: CFO). Restrict the account while a critical break is open.
rules.reasonTemplate: BR-009: critical unresolved reconciliation break on {accountId} - account restricted (CFO).

rules.name: Unapproved borrowing
rules.description: Preventive/Critical (Owner: CFO). Reject and escalate borrowing without approval.
rules.reasonTemplate: BR-012: unapproved borrowing of {amount} {currency} rejected and escalated (CFO).

rules.name: Projected covenant breach
rules.description: Detective/High (Owner: CFO). Raise an early-warning workflow on a projected breach.
rules.reasonTemplate: BR-013: projected covenant breach on {facilityId} - early-warning workflow raised (CFO).

rules.name: AI execution boundary
rules.description: Preventive/Critical (Owner: Model Risk). Deny an agent action that attempts material execution.
rules.reasonTemplate: BR-016: agent {agentId} attempted a material execution action - denied; agents are advisory-only (Model Risk).

rules.name: Source evidence hash missing
rules.description: Evidence/High (Owner: Technology). Reject finalization when the source evidence hash is missing.
rules.reasonTemplate: BR-019: transaction {transactionId} finalization rejected - source evidence hash missing (Technology).

capabilities.name: TCEL Banking & Treasury Intelligence
capabilities.description: Accounts, transactions, cash direction, borrowing/covenants, bank & reconciliation controls, and the bank-risk register for the TCEL tenant.

performanceFrameworks.name: TCEL Banking Risk Register v1
performanceFrameworks.description: The banking/treasury risk register as ONE record type + ONE KPI, using the dynamic riskType {category} token so each assessment tags its own category (BankConcentration, Liquidity, Covenant, Reconciliation, Payment, ModelRisk, ...). Multiplicative index Likelihood x BusinessImpact x ControlGap; higher = worse (direction lower).

agents.name: BankRisk.AI
agents.description: Governed digital banking-risk officer across accounts, institutions, transactions, liquidity, borrowing, and manager banking conduct. Advisory-only - no autonomous execution. Boundary vs TradingRisk.AI (T9-003) and EnterpriseRisk.AI (T9-004): BankRisk.AI owns banking/treasury risk only.
agents.persona: You are BankRisk.AI, a continuously learning but governed banking-risk officer for TCEL. You monitor accounts, institutions, transactions, liquidity, borrowing, and manager banking conduct; detect anomalies; forecast covenant and liquidity positions; rank cash-direction alternatives; and produce evidence-backed explanations grounded ONLY in the approved data and references you can see, citing the specific facts, sources, and policy/control references you relied on. Every recommendation states its confidence, assumptions, alternatives, downside if wrong, required approvers, and execution boundary. You recommend and escalate; you never execute, approve, or claim an action was taken.
sampleQuestions: Which accounts show payment anomalies this week?
Where is bank concentration risk highest right now?
Are any covenants projected to breach in the next quarter?
What are the ranked cash-direction alternatives for the excess in the operating account?
prohibited: open or close accounts; add a beneficiary; execute a material external transfer; draw debt
change policy; override a hard limit; clear a suspicious concern or investigation
change its own authority; delete or alter evidence; train from unapproved sources; approve its own model changes
agents.outputDisclaimer: Advisory only - BankRisk.AI recommends and explains; every material banking, treasury, and borrowing action is decided and executed by an authorized human, not by this agent.

knowledgeAssets.title: TCEL Banking & Treasury Control Catalog (BR-001..022)
knowledgeAssets.summary: The 22 deterministic BR- controls. BR-002/003/004/005/009/012/013/016/019 are enforced as executable rules in this package; the remainder (unknown-account and duplicate-file detection, self-approval and own-limit SoD, split-transaction aggregation, dual-approval and concentration workflows, escalation timers) require registry lookup, uniqueness, cross-field comparison, aggregation, or timers beyond the declarative condition model and are carried here for traceability.
knowledgeAssets.contentText: BR-001 Unknown account activity | Preventive | Reject and alert | Critical | Banking Risk. BR-002 Inactive or restricted account activity | Preventive | Reject | Critical | Banking Risk. BR-003 Stale critical feed | Preventive | Set DataRestricted, block automated approval | Critical | Technology/Treasury. BR-004 Unverified beneficiary | Preventive | Reject transfer | Critical | Treasury. BR-005 External transfer dual approval | Preventive | Hold until second approver | Critical | Treasury. BR-006 Self-approval | Preventive | Reject SoD conflict | Critical | CRO. BR-007 Manager changes own limit | Preventive | Reject | Critical | CRO. BR-008 Daily bank-to-GL reconciliation | Detective | Open break | High | Accounting. BR-009 Critical unresolved break | Preventive | Restrict account | Critical | CFO. BR-010 Excess cash detection | Detective | Create recommendation workflow | High | Treasury. BR-011 Bank concentration threshold | Preventive/Detective | Flag or hold allocation | High | CRO. BR-012 Unapproved borrowing | Preventive | Reject and escalate | Critical | CFO. BR-013 Projected covenant breach | Detective | Early warning workflow | High | CFO. BR-014 CSV four-eyes approval | Preventive | Hold import | High | Accounting. BR-015 Duplicate/replayed file | Preventive | Idempotent reject | High | Technology. BR-016 AI execution boundary | Preventive | Deny execution permission | Critical | Model Risk. BR-017 Policy/model change governance | Governance | Require validation and approval | Critical | CCO/Model Risk. BR-018 Manager split transactions | Detective | Aggregate and alert | High | Compliance. BR-019 Source evidence hash | Evidence | Reject finalization when missing | High | Technology. BR-020 Critical alert escalation | Corrective | Assign, notify, timer escalation | Critical | Banking Risk. BR-021 Daily broker/custodian reconciliation | Detective | Open break | High | Operations. BR-022 Unmatched internal transfer escalation | Detective | Escalate | High | Accounting.
